title: Magex's Santa Trader
description: A resource pack that changes the Wandering Trader into Santa Claus
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdd9a56751f8f99054ac215c85e891ffdda0a6b7.png)

# About
**A small Resource Pack that changes the Wandering Trader and Trader Llama into Santa Claus and a Reindeer!**

# Features
- Changes the Wandering Trader Model into Santa Claus
- Changes the Trader Llama Model into a Reindeer

# Requirements
![REQUIREMENTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5565ec4f08401f848919a99ff1872b81d89e19d4.png)
